response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience with C++ (National Instruments) and strong software engineering skills, but lacks recent C++ work, relevant industrial automation experience, and direct exposure to the required cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443). His expertise leans heavily toward web, mobile, and embedded systems with modern languages (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang), which does not align closely with the role's focus on C++ and industrial automation.
strengths: Strong software engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, refactoring)
Diverse technical background with problem-solving and innovation
concerns: No recent C++ development (last significant experience in 2015)
Lacks industrial automation or on-premises/cloud platform experience for automation machinery
No demonstrated knowledge of IEC 62443 or secure development lifecycle for industrial systems
